subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-04
subcodes.first_line: In this prayer we have just read, Bahá'u'lláh meant Abdul-Hamid, the Turkish Sultan who has lately been dethroned.
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
